title: Set of 2 Cloud Shaped Floating Wall Shelf Decorative Bedroom Nursery Display Unit Child's Cloud Shelves Children’s Nursery Floating Shelf Child's Bedroom Themed Boy/Girl (White)
features: Add floating fun to your little one’s room with this set of 2 cloud shelves. Stylish and practical, display their toys, pictures and postcards on these whimsical shelves

A cloud-shaped wall shelf is a whimsical and charming decor piece that adds imagination to any room. Resembling the fluffy silhouette of a cloud, this shelf not only offers functional storage space but also serves as an enchanting focal point for your wall decor

Crafted from durable engineered wood, metal, or acrylic, cloud-shaped wall shelves are designed to be mounted on the wall, creating a delightful display area. The cloud shape typically features soft, rounded edges, evoking a sense of serenity and playfulness

Cloud-shaped wall shelves provide versatile storage options. Each "cloud" section can serve as a shelf for displaying small items or decor pieces, allowing you to showcase your favourite trinkets, books, or plants in a delightful arrangement

The whimsical design of a cloud-shaped wall shelf adds a touch of whimsy and imagination to any space, making it ideal for children's rooms, nurseries, or playrooms. However, it can also bring a sense of lightness and creativity to other areas of the home, such as living rooms, bedrooms, or home offices
Whether used individually as a charming accent or grouped together to create a captivating wall display, a cloud-shaped wall shelf is sure to inspire joy and wonder in your home decor
Size Check: Small shelf: 50w x 13d x 25h cm Large Shelf: 55w x 14d x 30h cm
description: Product Description Wall Shelves Simple and Modern Design--These shelves with just a simple one-line structure not only enhance the aesthetic of any contemporary house but also match rooms or bedrooms with different design styles. Nothing but only a few screws are needed to fix these shelves to the wall and maintain their function Round Wire Shelf Easy Assembly--The wooden floating shelves come with all mounting accessories making it easy and effortless to set the shelves up in a few minutes Hexagonal Set of 3s Multifunctional and Practical--You can choose to combine these black floating shelves together or hang them separately to get the perfect and organized appearance of any room; No matter whether it is in the bedroom or office, bathroom, or kitchen, these shelves will be hung flush on the wall giving you more space to storage your favourite belongings. Hexagonal Wire Gold Sturdy & Durable--Floating shelves are made of MDF wood with a dampproof, heat-resistant. The wood boards are non-poisonous and harmless after being carbonized and fumigated. Sturdy enough to hold any small items you want for a long time Moon Shaped Wooden Suitable for Different Walls--No matter it is a brick wall, drywall, or concrete wall, the floating shelves can be installed easily. You just need to choose suitable screws according to the specification.
